db.postgres.connection.description: Creates a reusable Postgres connection context for downstream database nodes.
db.sqlServer.connection.description: Creates a reusable SQL Server connection context for downstream database nodes.
db.mysql.connection.description: Creates a reusable MySQL connection context for downstream database nodes.
db.table.description: Selects a table from the upstream database connection and loads column metadata.
db.select.description: Selects rows from the upstream database table.
db.insert.description: Inserts a row into the upstream database table.
db.upsert.description: Inserts a row or updates it when key columns already exist.
db.update.description: Updates rows in the upstream database table.
db.delete.description: Deletes rows from the upstream database table.
db.executeQuery.description: Executes a raw SQL query using the upstream database connection.
